title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at FM Logistic India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at FM Logistic India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
FM Logistic India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Chennai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FM Logistic India:
FM Logistic India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FM Logistic India!
